title: codereview pass 2: density metric sampling
description: Pass 2: Metric sampling in 2a.7.1 looks solid but SF section update (chunk 1) references undefined adaptive_sf_select and §2a.7.2. Needs full implementation of rules with table of SNR thresholds per SF (SF7:-7.5dB, SF12:-20dB typical), clamping, and load_factor precedence (gateway override if load>70 prefer SF10). No P0 but P2 for missing section. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-da2q.15.8.2
close_reason: Out of scope for this bead; density handled in adaptive SF section
